title: Advanced Mobs
description: Adding harder versions of vanilla mobs that scale from difficulty - think of as elite versions from the originals.
body:
### Overview

Ever bored of the same mobs that are easily overgeard with the best enchantments and it is no challenge anymore? Keeping it in a vanilla friendly vibe with no crazy stuff and complex items, just mobs - rewards you ask? Your survival is it not enough?

***

### 🧠 Smarter Spawns, Real Challenge

Advanced Mobs doesn't just add new creatures — it replaces some of Minecraft's classics with **elite versions** that grow stronger depending on your difficulty setting. On hard mode? Better bring backup.

***

### ⚔️ Features That Make You Sweat

*   **Elite Mob Variants** – Rare and dangerous versions of zombies, skeletons, and blazes with custom textures and behavior.
*   **Difficulty-Based Scaling** – The harder the game, the more powerful your enemies become. You choose how tough they get.
*   **Deep, Menacing Sounds** – Same iconic growls and hisses, but with a darker twist.
*   **Custom Spawn Eggs** – Like vanilla, but deadlier. Easily spawn your nightmares in creative mode.

***

### ⚙️ Fully Configurable

Want even more control? Advanced Mobs lets you tweak scaling, spawning, and behavior right from the config.

***

### 💀 List of Mobs

*   Brutal Zombie
*   Golden Skeleton
*   Infernal Blaze
*   Infernal Wither Skeleton
*   Subzero Stray
*   Giant Spider
*   Toxic Cave Spider
*   Blasting Creeper
*   Brute Enderman
*   Corrupted Husk
*   Deepling Drowned
*   Occult Witch
*   Vicious Phantom

***

**Advanced Mobs** — because danger should scale with your courage.

***

You can adjust loot and spawn behavior with datapacks.

You have my permission to use it in a Modpack only on Curseforge.

***

I've also created a Modpack with Staged Progression:

[![araxers-staged-survival](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/thumbnails/1015/637/64/64/638541401689107183.jpeg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/araxers-staged-survival)    [Araxer's: Ages - Staged Survival](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/araxers-staged-survival)
